# MuleSoft Salesforce Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (11.4) of Salesforce Connector documentation.
> See [Salesforce Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Salesforce Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Salesforce Connector 11.4](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Salesforce Connector 11.4 Additional Configuration Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-connector/latest/salesforce-connector-config-topics.md)
- [Salesforce Connector 11.4 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-connector/latest/salesforce-connector-examples.md)
- [Processing Events with Salesforce Connector 11.4](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-connector/latest/salesforce-connector-processing-events.md)
- [Salesforce Connector 11.4 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-connector/latest/salesforce-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Salesforce Connector 11.4](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-connector/latest/salesforce-connector-studio.md)
- [Troubleshooting Salesforce Connector 11.4](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-connector/latest/salesforce-connector-troubleshoot.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Salesforce Connector to 11.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-connector/latest/salesforce-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Salesforce Connector 11.4 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-connector/latest/salesforce-connector-xml-maven.md)
